createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date marking the start of this pool cycle

slug.description: Recipe slug referencing a recipe in the catalog

addedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the meal was added to the pool (YYYY-MM-DD)

cookedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the meal was cooked — absent means still in pool

meals.description: Meals in the pool — order is not significant, UI sorts by freshness/urgency

description: Weekly meal pool — floating meals with no day assignments
